evals.prompt: /ultra-verify decision 'Should we use PostgreSQL or MongoDB for our new microservice?'
evals.expected_output: Claude answers first, then launches Gemini and Codex in parallel, collects all three analyses, and presents a synthesis with consensus scoring
assertions: Claude writes its own analysis BEFORE reading external AI output
Launches Gemini and Codex in parallel (run_in_background)
Creates session directory under .ultra/collab/ with verify-decision in name
Reads all three output files with Read tool
Includes per-AI recommendation summary and trade-off matrix

evals.prompt: /ultra-verify diagnose 'API returns 500 intermittently under load, logs show connection pool exhaustion'
evals.expected_output: Three sets of hypotheses collected and ranked by consensus count
assertions: Each hypothesis includes evidence and verification steps
Recommended investigation order based on consensus

evals.expected_output: Three-way code audit with findings graded by consensus (3=critical, 2=high, 1=investigate)
assertions: Sends same audit prompt to all three AIs
Findings graded by how many AIs found them
3/3 findings marked Critical, 2/3 marked High, 1/3 marked Investigate
Action items prioritized by consensus count

evals.prompt: /ultra-verify estimate 'Implement OAuth2 login with Google and GitHub providers'
evals.expected_output: Three effort estimates compared for convergence
assertions: Each AI provides estimate with breakdown and assumptions
Final recommended estimate with confidence level
